mermaidSyntax:
graph TD A[Signaling Molecule
Ligand] --> B[Cell Surface
Receptor] B --> C[Conformational
Change] C --> D[Intracellular
Signal Proteins] D --> E[Second Messengers
cAMP, Ca2+, IP3] E --> F[Kinase Cascade
Amplification] F --> G[Cellular Response
Gene Expression, Metabolism] style A fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style B fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff style G fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
